title: Caulokaempferia coenobialis
taxonomy: Caulokaempferia coenobialis is classified within the family Zingiberaceae, which is a family of flowering plants commonly known as gingers. The genus Caulokaempferia is a part of this family, and C. coenobialis is one of its species. This plant is native to Southeast Asia and is typically found in tropical regions. Caulokaempferia coenobialis is a type of rhizomatous perennial herb, characterized by its underground stems and leaves. Further classification of C. coenobialis includes its kingdom as Plantae and its order as Zingiberales.
